string.text: {=UcijoezB}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=3GWLLuCs}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has served Aragon for generations.
{=urJ3RjRc}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has stood in the king's council and discharged its duties honorably since the first days of the kingdom.

{=PKfLrhX4}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of Aragon.
{=xphC6nQF}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}, one of the most illustrious families in the annals of Aragon.

{=YBjZH6X7}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}, one of the most illustrious families in the annals of Aragon. The heathens we have slain, and the glory we have won, is second to none.
{=hdPSRXr7}rightful King of the Crown of Aragon
{=aZgEDvsN}rightful Queen of the Crown of Aragon
